name: PensionPro Retirement Plan Administration API
what_it_does: PensionPro REST API for retirement plan administration platform. Enables AI agents to manage retirement plan client and plan data, handle document management and compliance tracking, access contribution and vesting calculation workflows, retrieve IRS and DOL filing status data (Form 5500, etc.), manage participant records and beneficiary data, handle plan compliance testing (ADP/ACP testing), access billing and engagement data for TPA firms, retrieve plan amendment and restatement tracking, manage employee census data workflows, and integrate plan administration with recordkeeping platforms.
use_cases: Managing retirement plan client portfolios from TPA automation agents
Tracking compliance filing status from ERISA compliance agents
Accessing participant census and vesting data from plan administration agents
Integrating plan administration with recordkeepers from retirement automation agents
not_for: Individual retirement account (IRA) management without employer plan TPA focus
Investment management without plan administration and compliance needs
Non-retirement financial services without ERISA and DOL compliance
best_when: A Third Party Administrator (TPA), recordkeeper, or retirement plan consultant using PensionPro wants AI agents to automate plan administration workflows, compliance tracking, IRS filing management, census processing, and client engagement.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Retirement plan participant data includes sensitive financial and personal information. ERISA fiduciary responsibilities — automated plan advice must comply with DOL regulations. IRS and DOL filing errors create tax penalties and regulatory consequences. Participant data includes Social Security numbers and financial account information.

auth.notes: PensionPro uses API key authentication. TPA firm-level credentials. Integration documentation for recordkeeper and data exchange partners. No granular scope control. REST API with plan administration data access. No webhooks — batch data exchange model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — TPA subscription pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-plan and per-TPA firm pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: Cornelius, North Carolina. Founded 2007. Leading retirement plan administration workflow platform for TPAs. Used by 800+ TPA firms managing 50,000+ retirement plans. CRM workflow system for retirement plan TPA operations. Strong integration with major recordkeepers (Fidelity, Vanguard, etc.). Competes with Relius and FTWilliam for TPA software.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; basic documentation

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK+PRIVACY: Participant SSNs and retirement account balances — ERISA fiduciary responsibility
No public MCP server — basic API key REST API with limited documentation
ERISA compliance automation — DOL fiduciary rules apply to automated plan decisions and communications
IRS Form 5500 filing errors create tax penalties — automated filing requires compliance review
No granular scopes — API key grants full TPA firm access; restrict carefully
No webhooks — batch data exchange is the primary integration model with recordkeepers
agent_readiness.security_notes: Retirement plan participant data with SSNs. SOC2, ERISA. API key only. US data residency. ERISA fiduciary compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Retirement plan data with SSNs. SOC2, ERISA. API key only. US data residency. ERISA fiduciary.
